content: Start by playing around Chaos Faction

Its good enough to carry you to chapter 2
But once you get a grasp on the game its fun to mix 2 factions like Magic The Gathering

embeds.title: 《忘卻前夜》丨概念PV——「萬千子嗣之母」
embeds.description:
感受我，融入我，播種我——
果然，你就是我尋求的完美人選
哎呀，太心急了，只差一點……我可不會讓你逃走
5月18日 「萬千子嗣之母」等你將這乾涸的末日填滿
然後，遺忘我。

——願銀鑰指引前路

▶港澳新馬官網：https://morimens.qookkagames.com
▶台灣官網：https://morimens.sialiagames.com.tw

Shield you can go Faros, Sanga, Nautila and Alea

Tentacle focused team you can go Tulu, Goliath, Celeste, Ramona

you can just build your own team based on how i build this team

does anyone know how does this skill work? its kinda confusing <:RWcatthonk:640586461468426257>
default in attack type, if this card in ur hand and another card trigger 跃迁, change into defend type. vice versa.

when be played in defend type, gain Alert stacks, remove Fragile debuff. (if dupe 1: gain 1 Defend card in addition)
when be played in attack type, gain Str stacks, remove Weekness debuff. (if dupe 1: gain 1 Strike card in addition)
if u dont like pvp mode, just ignore it, u would lost nothing

no, in fact the condition is, a card get into the ultra space stack ( those 5 purple box above ur head)
